next_direction: Run old best (Jost+sigmoid) on new dataset
Lower floor_max to 0.45 and sigmoid_mid to 0.30 improved overall 0.037->0.336; next explore lower floor_max or adjust sigmoid_k
Lowering floor_max to 0.40 improved discrimination but hurt recall too much; keep floor_max=0.45 and tune sigmoid_k next
Sharpening sigmoid_k to 30 improved fixed-split and passed CV; keep floor_max=0.45 and tune sigmoid_mid next
sigmoid_mid=0.32 recovered plausibility but lost too much retrieval; keep exp_lme_0008 as best and try smaller local moves
sigmoid_mid=0.31 also failed to beat exp_lme_0008; stop midpoint-up micro-tuning and try a different local axis
sigmoid_k=25 also failed to beat exp_lme_0008; local floor-shape tuning looks exhausted, so change mechanism next
45 experiments run, search converged. Best exp_lme_0008 CV=0.3466. Escalation: need to change outside allowed surface
Zero-impact bypass passed strict validation (strict_score=0.4585); focus on improving activation-recall correlation (0.27)
ESCALATION: search converged on both caches. Bottleneck is activation-recall correlation (~0.27) not addressable via decay params. Need protocol/evaluator change.

FINAL CONVERGENCE: 75 experiments, both caches converged. All 3 alternative mechanisms (Hebbian-decay, hyperbolic floor, adaptive threshold) failed. Escalation required — options: evaluator weights, reactivation policy, dataset/embedding change.

FINAL CONVERGENCE: 92 experiments. retrieval_consolidation ceiling ~0.39-0.40 (16 param combos). CV=0.3459 tied with baseline. All policies identical to baseline. Requires outside-surface change: evaluator weights, new embedding, or protocol change.

ADDITIVE FORMULA IMPLEMENTED: retrieval_consolidation goes from 0.39->0.66 fixed split but CV% stays at 38.0% (fold variance unchanged). Scores inflated but rankings unchanged. Fold dominance confirmed.
Dual-state retrieval_only + higher retrieval_boost still failed badly on overall; stop tuning plain retrieval_only and move to stronger hybrid reinforcement policies.
Hybrid retrieval_with_storage_fraction beats pure retrieval_only but still loses to exp_lme_0128; tune retrieval_storage_boost_scale upward before changing decay again.
Hybrid storage-fraction policies can spike fixed-split score but failed CV badly (0.2528 +/- 37.6%); next steps must optimize for CV robustness, not fixed-split peaks.
Margin+BM25 gating improved fixed-split score but CV stayed at 0.2528 +/- 37.6%; the current hybrid retrieval-rule family appears exhausted without a larger protocol change.
CV BUGFIX: exp_lme_0157 accepted as new best (CV=0.4010, CV%=27.7%). Dual-state hybrid family is alive. Next: test storage_scale > 0.80 and re-evaluate previously rejected variants.
Post-bugfix optimization complete. CV=0.5035 (+44% over baseline). Storage_scale, activation_weight, jost_power all optimized. Search converging at CV~0.50.
CONVERGENCE: CV=0.5101. 9 experiments across reinforcement/stability/reactivation axes all within 0.0026 of each other. Search surface exhausted. Further gains require protocol/evaluator changes.
